pr.title: Record: val_bpb=1.1574 — Int6 + MLP 3x + selective precision + optimized long-context training

output.summary: Int6 quantization with fp16 selective precision frees space for 3× MLP while train@2048 and stride-256 sliding eval capture long contexts efficiently.
techniques: Post-training int6 quantization with fp16 embedding and late-K passthrough
Expanded MLP hidden size to 1536 within the 16MB budget
Train@2048 plus stride-256 sliding window eval with tight grad clipping
